description_long: This is a single-story log cabin with a broad, dark gable roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a circular grassy base. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked logs, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The front facade features a covered porch with wooden railings, providing a sheltered entryway. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the longer sides, with a mix of medium-sized rectangular panes. The roof has two visible chimneys and a slight overhang, enhancing weather protection. The cabin sits slightly elevated above the ground, with a stone or concrete foundation visible at the base.
description: A rustic log cabin with a dark gable roof, covered porch, and symmetrically arranged windows on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the log construction and the solid gable end with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the opposite long side with windows and the absence of a porch.
description_view_3: Rear gable view showing the roof overhang, exposed log beams, and foundation, with no visible entry.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs and two chimneys, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically distributed along the longer sides; no windows on the gable ends
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade, opening onto the covered porch
